According to the UN Office for the Coordination of Humanitarian Affairs (OCHA), citing local health authorities, more than 1,000 Palestinians had been killed since the ceasefire was announced on 10 October 2025."},{"url":"https://www.bbc.com/news/live/cjr5vpzrg4et","title":"Israel and Hamas begin indirect talks in Egypt on Trump's Gaza peace plan - BBC News","content":"Israel has agreed to the US's 20-point peace plan, and Hamas has accepted some - but not all - parts.
It's the closest the two sides have come to a deal, but major sticking points remain, our reporter in Jerusalem Tom Bennett writes.
Indirect talks between Israel and Hamas negotiators have begun in Sharm El-Sheikh.
It's a little after 18:30 in Sharm El-Sheikh (16:30 BST), where delegations for Hamas and Israel are expected to start indirect negotiations in the coming hours.
As we reported a little earlier, Hamas negotiators are not scheduled to travel to the resort city in the southern tip of the Sinai Peninsula until 18:00 local time (16:00 BST)."},{"url":"https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2025/10/7/day-one-of-gaza-peace-talks-ends-on-positive-note-in-egypt","title":"Day one of Israel and Hamas indirect talks ends on ‘positive’ note in Egypt | Israel-Palestine conflict News | Al Jazeera","content":"The first day of resumed indirect talks between Israel and Hamas in Egypt ended on a positive note, amid hopes of a potential deal to implement United States President Donald Trump’s 20-point plan to end the war on Gaza, multiple sources told Al Jazeera and other media outlets."},{"url":"https://apnews.com/article/israel-palestinians-hamas-war-news-10-06-2025-3c3e1d13e86fabeaaff7930a18c6590a","title":"Israel and Hamas launch indirect talks in Egypt | AP News","content":"Meanwhile, Israeli and Hamas officials are meeting in Sharm el-Sheikh, Egypt Monday in hopes of hammering out a potential ceasefire in Gaza.
Egypt’s state-owned Al-Qahera News television station reported that the talks began with a meeting between Arab mediators and the Hamas delegation.
U.S. envoy Steve Witkoff and Trump’s son-in-law Jared Kushner were also expected to join the talks, local Egyptian media said.
The ministry is part of the Hamas-run government, and the U.N. and many independent experts consider its figures to be the most reliable estimate of wartime casualties.
Hamas-led militants abducted 251 people and killed around 1,200, mostly civilians, in the Oct."},{"url":"https://www.france24.com/en/middle-east/20250818-hamas-delegation-in-egypt-receives-new-gaza-truce-plan-palestinian-official-says","title":"Hamas agrees to latest Gaza ceasefire proposal - France 24","content":"Palestinian group Hamas on Monday agreed to a new proposal from mediators to end the nearly two-year-long war in the Gaza Strip, a Hamas source told AFP.
The plan reportedly involves a 60-day ceasefire "during which 10 Israeli hostages would be released alive, along with a number of bodies", said a source from Islamic Jihad.
Hamas has accepted a new ceasefire proposal for Gaza, a senior member from the group said Monday, after a fresh diplomatic push to end more than 22 months of war.
"The movement has submitted its response, agreeing to the mediators' new proposal."}]}

{"query":"Hamas official response new ceasefire proposal Egypt indirect talks","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.i24news.tv/en/news/israel-at-war/artc-hamas-gives-positive-response-to-cairo-proposal-on-gaza-ceasefire-phase-two-report","title":"Hamas gives 'positive response' to Cairo proposal on Gaza ceasefire phase two - report","content":"*   Hamas gives 'positive response' to Cairo proposal on Gaza ceasefire phase two - report. Hamas said it has received new proposals from mediators in Cairo aimed at breaking the deadlock over the second phase of the Gaza ceasefire agreement, as negotiations remain stalled over disputes between the sides. The group said its delegation held meetings in Cairo last week with mediators and Palestinian factions, focused on “the implementation of the remaining commitments of phase one of the ceasefire agreement and preparations for discussions on the arrangements for the second phase, in light of President Trump’s plan.” Hamas added that it will submit its formal response after completing internal consultations. Image 3: Hamas refuses to disarm, move to next phase of Gaza ceasefire. Hamas refuses to disarm, move to next phase of Gaza ceasefire. The plan reportedly calls for a “simultaneous implementation” approach, completing phase one while opening negotiations on the second phase of the agreement.","score":0.7568076,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8Y8ftIXRHiQ","title":"Hamas accepts new ceasefire proposal mediated by Egypt and Qatar: Source","content":"Hamas accepts new ceasefire proposal mediated by Egypt and Qatar: Source
Al Jazeera English
18100000 subscribers
1521 likes
83902 views
18 Aug 2025
A source tells Al Jazeera Arabic that Hamas has accepted a new ceasefire proposal put forward by Egypt and Qatar, the two countries leading mediation efforts between the group and Israel.
A Hamas source told Al Jazeera: “We informed the mediators of our approval of their proposal, which was presented yesterday.”
The terms however, of this proposed deal, have not been made public.
The move came as Qatar’s Prime Minister Sheikh Mohammed bin Abdulrahman bin Jassim Al Thani held talks with Egyptian President Abdel Fattah el-Sisi in Cairo to discuss the push for a ceasefire in Gaza.

Al Jazeera’s Hamdah Salhut reports from Amman, Jordan.

One Egyptian official, with direct knowledge of the negotiations, said the bridging proposal requires the implementation of the deal's first phase, which has Hamas releasing the most vulnerable civilian hostages captured in its Oct. 7 attack on Israel that sparked the war. Naim said the proposal also includes unspecified changes to the exchange of hostages held in Gaza for Palestinians imprisoned in Israel and doesn't guarantee that a cease-fire would remain in place during negotiations on the transition from the deal's first phase to the second.","score":0.65914243,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.8,"request_id":"81ad1e19-4cd7-421d-8fea-5cd68b859663"}
